data.body:
Goal:
Prototype a denser beat overview screen that uses one compact column per beat state, while keeping it clearly non-kanban: no drag affordances, no drop lanes, and no workflow-moving interaction.

Verification:
1. Run `bun run lint` and expect success.
2. Run `bunx tsc --noEmit` and expect success.
3. Run `bun run test` and expect success.
4. Run `bun run build` and expect success.
5. Open `http://localhost:4137/beats?view=overview&state=queued` and confirm the overview renders as dense state columns on desktop, remains usable on mobile, and does not expose lease beats.

Constraints:
Use the existing dedicated worktree/dev server when possible so the in-app browser can hot-reload. Keep the overview an inspection surface, not a kanban board.
data.title: Tighten beat overview columns
